calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-25-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: ELLEN CHAITIN, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Susan Lee, #4280.
Petitioner Zhuoxuan Guan (mother) was present in pro per as Guardian ad Litem for the minor Yayi Guan, and with Cantonese Interpreter: Stella Li.
Petitioner and Interpreter were placed under oath and examined.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Minor's father Qiaoqin Zhou was not present, but signed and consented to the name change of the minor in the petition.
Proof of Publication is in the file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to Vicky Yi Guan.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
